notes: Exact prefix of the UnknownSyntax error variant message defined via thiserror in error.rs; raised in assets.rs when a requested syntax name cannot be resolved.

query: Use of bat as a pager is disallowed
notes: Exact message of the InvalidPagerValueBat error variant in error.rs; raised in output.rs to prevent infinite recursion when bat detects itself as the configured pager.
Struct defined in line_range.rs for a single inclusive line range; used in controller.rs to check each line against visible ranges and in config.rs via VisibleLines.
Main orchestration struct defined in controller.rs; instantiated in src/bin/bat/main.rs and drives the full render pipeline from input to output.
Enum defined in syntax_mapping.rs (MapTo/MapToUnknown/MapExtensionToUnknown); used in assets.rs for syntax resolution and in bin/bat/app.rs when registering user-provided mappings.

query: where is syntax highlighting applied to output lines
notes: Conceptual query for the per-line highlighting pipeline. InteractivePrinter in printer.rs does syntect highlighting and ANSI escape construction; it pulls syntax definitions from assets.rs and is invoked by controller.rs.

query: where is the pager launched and configured
notes: Conceptual query for pager integration. OutputType and try_pager live in output.rs; pager.rs resolves pager kind and source from env; controller.rs decides whether to use a pager based on config.paging_mode.

query: where are file extension to syntax mappings defined and resolved
notes: Conceptual query for syntax mapping. SyntaxMapping struct and MappingTarget enum live in syntax_mapping.rs; built-in glob-to-syntax rules are in syntax_mapping/builtin.rs.

query: where are command line flags defined and parsed
notes: Conceptual query for CLI arg definitions. build_app() with all flag definitions lives in src/bin/bat/clap_app.rs; App::matches_to_inputs and config construction from matches live in src/bin/bat/app.rs.

Impact check for editing HighlightingAssets. controller.rs receives &HighlightingAssets and passes it to InteractivePrinter; printer.rs reads syntax_set and theme_set from it; src/bin/bat/assets.rs constructs it from cache or binary.

Library-level Config<'a> struct in src/config.rs (not the binary config loader in src/bin/bat/config.rs). Changes to Config fields ripple into controller.rs (which takes &Config) and printer.rs (which reads language, tab_width, wrapping_mode, etc.).

query: how does bat go from a file path input to rendered highlighted output
notes: Cross-file workflow query. src/bin/bat/main.rs constructs Config and calls Controller::run; controller.rs opens each Input via input.rs, selects the syntax through assets.rs, constructs InteractivePrinter from printer.rs, and drives the line-by-line render loop.
